title: Representative Men
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
description:
Representative Men is a collection of seven lectures by Ralph Waldo Emerson, published as a book of essays in 1850. The first essay discusses the role played by "great men" in society, and the remaining six each extol the virtues of one of six men deemed by Emerson to be great:Plato 
Emanuel Swedenborg 
Michel de Montaigne 
William Shakespeare 
Napoleon 
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe
